history.changes: No changes needed. The original skill achieved 100/100 on both tasks consistently across 2 runs. qwen3.5-122b handles the full skill content well given its 122B parameter size.

notes: The unoptimized skill (copied from skills/document-docx/) already achieves perfect scores on both tasks (docx-create and docx-extract) for qwen3.5-122b on the bare runtime. Both runs confirmed 100/100 with costs of ~$0.005-0.006 per task and completion times of 13-17s. No optimization was required.
